---
title: "Questionlets for Quantitative Methods"
subtitle: "Small Questions. Deep Understanding."
page-layout: full
toc: false
sidebar: english
---

::: {.hero}
Build quantitative intuition one focused question at a time. Choose a topic, think through the prompt, then reveal the answer when you are ready.

[Start with descriptive statistics](en/descriptive-statistics.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
:::

## Preface

::: {.preface}
<!-- Replace the paragraph below with your English preface. -->

Add your English preface here. You can explain the purpose of Questionlets, the intended audience, and how readers should use the questions.
:::

## Explore the topics

::: {.topic-grid}
::: {.topic-card}
### [Descriptive statistics](en/descriptive-statistics.qmd)
Summaries, distributions, and variation.
:::
::: {.topic-card}
### [Probability](en/probability.qmd)
Events, conditional probability, and expectation.
:::
::: {.topic-card}
### [Statistical inference](en/inference.qmd)
Samples, uncertainty, and hypothesis tests.
:::
::: {.topic-card}
### [Regression](en/regression.qmd)
Coefficients, residuals, and assumptions.
:::
:::
